title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 27 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 27 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 27 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 27/07/2022
DCE iron ore was was shocked sharply all the day.The main contract closed at 744.5,increased of 2.41%. Traders are actively motivated toship, Speculative demand increases. Steel mills are mainly on the sidelines, and market turnover continues to pick up.PBF at Shandong port dealt 730 -745 yuan/mt;decrease 15 yuan/mt than yesterday.
